dailyNews.description: Adobe says AI traffic to U.S. retail sites also jumped 269% in March, with visitors converting better and generating more revenue than non-AI shoppers.

dailyNews.title: Syria takes control of all bases where US forces were deployed
dailyNews.description: Final convoy of US soldiers and equipment departs Qasrak air base in the northeastern governorate of Hasakah.

dailyNews.title: Israel, Lebanon Agree On 10-Day Ceasefire, Says Trump; Eyes 'Ending 10th War'
dailyNews.description: Trump says Lebanon and Israel will begin a temporary ceasefire from 5 p.m. EST as Washington pushes for a broader peace agreement.

dailyNews.title: Google adds Nano Banana-powered image generation to Gemini’s Personal Intelligence
dailyNews.description: The feature will be initially available to paid users in the U.S.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Israel and Lebanon agree to temporary ceasefire
dailyNews.description: This is a breaking news story.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Israel and Lebanon agree to 10-day ceasefire, talks to begin on lasting peace
dailyNews.description: In a post on Truth Social, Trump said the ceasefire would begin at 5 p.m. EST and was aimed at creating space for broader peace negotiations.

dailyNews.description: Israel, Lebanon To Begin 10-Day Ceasefire In Less Than Six Hours: Trump

dailyNews.title: US strike on Pacific vessel kills three
dailyNews.description: US military footage released Wednesday shows its latest strike on a vessel in the eastern Pacific, killing three people.

dailyNews.title: US weighs executive order requiring banks to collect citizenship data, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent says
dailyNews.description: “And I don’t think it’s unreasonable, because why don’t we have information on who’s in our banking system?” Bessent said.

dailyNews.title: Priyanka Gandhi sees Amit Shah ‘laughing’ during women quota speech, says ‘Chanakya aaj agar zinda hote...’
dailyNews.description: Not missing a beat, Congress MP Priyanka Gandhi paused her Lok Sabha address to point out Union Home Minister Amit Shah “laughing” during her remarks. Here's what she said next.

dailyNews.title: FIFA ‘surprised’ by US backlash as transport costs skyrocket at World Cup
dailyNews.description: Both a top US lawmaker and the governor of New Jersey ask FIFA to pay World Cup transport bill amid ticket hikes.

dailyNews.title: TCS case: Supreme Court moved, plea seeks to classify 'forced religious conversion' as 'terrorist act'
dailyNews.description: BJP leader Ashwini Kumar Upadhyay filed a plea in the Supreme Court requesting measures against alleged religious conversions and sexual harassment at a TCS office in Nashik, following claims from eight female employees. The plea urges the establishment of special courts.

dailyNews.title: Tariff refund portal to be launched soon – How, when to claim refunds? All FAQs answered
dailyNews.description: The portal is set to launch days after the US Supreme Court – in February this year – ruled that tariffs imposed under the International Emergency Economic Powers Act were illegal, potentially leaving the government owing businesses as much as $175 billion

dailyNews.title: Hegseth says US blockade to continue, ready for new attacks on Iran energy
dailyNews.description: US urges resolution through talks, but says Washington 'locked and loaded' to resume attacks.

dailyNews.title: US defence secretary Pete Hegseth attacks press coverage of war on Iran
dailyNews.description: US defence secretary Hegseth criticised media coverage of the war on Iran.

dailyNews.title: Jackson publicly airs grievances with conservative colleagues over Trump-era rulings
dailyNews.description: Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson criticizes the Supreme Court's shadow docket, saying emergency orders often benefiting Trump erode public trust.

dailyNews.title: NOT BLUFFING: Stephen Miller says Trump is directly involved, 'holds all the cards' in Iran negotiations
dailyNews.description: Stephen Miller says Trump is directly involved in Iran negotiations, calling the U.S. blockade a move "resetting the entire global order."

dailyNews.title: Hegseth excoriates media, likening them to ‘Pharisees’ in Trump defense
dailyNews.description: Pete Hegseth ripped the media, likening them to biblical Pharisees who explained away goodness, amid the Iran ceasefire during Operation Epic Fury.

dailyNews.description: House Republicans blocked Democrats' war powers resolution aimed at halting the U.S. military campaign against Iran as Trump said the conflict is nearly over.

dailyNews.description: U.S. officials have issued a travel advisory for Tirana, Albania, urging American tourists to exercise increased vigilance amid ongoing Iran-related tensions.

dailyNews.title: Jasmine Crockett doesn't anticipate Trump 'canceling' the midterm elections
dailyNews.description: Rep. Jasmine Crockett, D-Texas, said she does not believe President Donald Trump plans to cancel the midterm elections but expects election interference.

dailyNews.title: White House Shrugs Off Shaky Economy as War Exceeds Trump’s Timeline
dailyNews.description: Stocks may be soaring again, but the war in Iran has started to pinch the finances of many Americans.

dailyNews.title: Democrats Make Final Push to Delay Confirmation Hearing of Trump’s Fed Pick
dailyNews.description: Kevin M. Warsh is scheduled to testify on Tuesday despite an ongoing criminal investigation into the chair of the Federal Reserve that stands in the way of a smooth transition.

dailyNews.title: Pope Leo, Amid Standoff With Trump, Says ‘Woe to Those Who Manipulate Religion’
dailyNews.description: For days, Pope Leo XIV has attracted criticism from President Trump and his allies for refusing to back the war in Iran. On Thursday, he reiterated his calls for peace.

dailyNews.title: The Costa Rican Mountain Town Offering Sanctuary to Families Deported by Trump
dailyNews.description: In a cloud forest village, a network of residents, foreigners and pacifist Quakers offered a precarious yet vital sanctuary for families expelled by the U.S. government.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s ‘Triumphal Arch’ Draws Backlash, Even From an Expert Who Proposed It
dailyNews.description: The story of how President Trump quadrupled the size of the original proposal for the arch follows a now-familiar pattern.

dailyNews.title: Xi Alludes to Trump’s Policies to Make a Case for Closer Ties to Vietnam
dailyNews.description: China used a visit by the Vietnamese leader to show a deepening of security ties that analysts say far outpaces U.S. defense ties in the region.

dailyNews.title: Israel and Lebanon agree to 10-day ceasefire, Trump says
dailyNews.description: President Trump says the leaders of Lebanon and Israel have agreed to begin a 10-day ceasefire starting at 5 p.m. Eastern.

dailyNews.title: Latest effort to rein in Trump on Iran falls short in House vote
dailyNews.description: Few Republicans have been willing to distance themselves from the president as the war's end remains uncertain.

dailyNews.title: Trump to sign executive order on psychedelic drug used abroad to treat PTSD
dailyNews.description: Ibogaine is used in Mexico and the Caribbean to treat depression, anxiety, addiction and brain trauma.

dailyNews.title: Zohran Mamdani on NYC campaign promises that haven't been fulfilled 100 days into his term
dailyNews.description: Zohran Mamdani is 100 days into his term as New York City's mayor. He joined "CBS Mornings" with more details on the status of his campaign promises for universal childcare and free buses. Mamdani also gave more details about his working relationship with President Trump.

dailyNews.title: House set to break with Trump, vote against ending deportation protections for Haitians
dailyNews.description: All House Democrats and four Republicans forced a vote on a measure to stop the Trump administration from ending temporary deportation protections for more than 300,000 people from Haiti.
